cards.name: 8 of Cups
cards.interpretation: abandonment, walking away, letting go, searching for truth, leaving behind

cards.name: 7 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: unfinished work, procrastination, low effort, waste, lack of growth, setbacks, impatience, lack of reward

cards.name: Knight of Swords, reversed
cards.interpretation: rude, tactless, forceful, bully, aggressive, vicious, ruthless, arrogant
